subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you! It was a pleasure crossing paths at the conference, and I'd love to continue that conversation formally.

Next week works well for a 30-minute call. Could you share a few time slots that suit you (with your timezone)? We'll confirm a time from our side and send over a calendar invite.

On the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share those directly. Once we've had our initial discussion and identified areas of alignment, I can coordinate introductions through the appropriate channels so the right people are looped in.

Thanks for following up, and talk soon!

Best regards
